summary: Full backend + frontend verification of Aatreya CMS. Rewrote backend_test.py as pytest suite (17 tests): auth, 8-resource CRUD cycles with public listing, file upload, contact inbox, settings, dashboard. All 17 tests PASS. Frontend admin flows verified via Playwright: /admin unauth redirect, login → JWT in localStorage under 'aatreya_admin_token', all 11 sidebar links render with correct data-testids, Services create→edit→delete flow succeeds, Settings save persists and is reflected at /api/public/settings, contact-inbox filters render, logout clears session. Public site regression: /, /about, /services, /projects, /contact, /terms all return 200 with content and no admin sidebar leak.

issues: Save/Cancel action row sits at the bottom of the drawer body and can be visually overlapped by the 'Made with Emergent' floating badge (bottom-right) on shorter viewports. Buttons remain clickable via keyboard/JS but a normal user click may be blocked. Consider making the drawer footer sticky or adding bottom padding.

action_items: Optional: make the ResourcePage drawer footer sticky so Save/Cancel are always above the Emergent badge overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PUT /admin/{path}/{id} requires the full base model (not partial). Frontend already sends full editing object so it works, but for future partial updates consider Optional fields or a PATCH endpoint.
CORSMiddleware is added AFTER app.include_router — works with Starlette but conventionally should be added before routers. Not a bug.
JWT_SECRET falls back to 'change-me' — ensure it's set in production .env.
seed_admin: correctly upserts and updates existing admin password if changed (verified via successful login with .env credentials).
seed_data_creation: None kept — all TEST_ prefixed data was cleaned up in CRUD test teardowns. Settings collection was written with TEST_ values by the settings test (site_title=TEST_Aatreya, contact_email=info@example.com, social_links.facebook set). Main agent may want to reset settings if these leak into UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py must be run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported (grep it from frontend/.env). Nav testids follow lowercased-label-with-hyphens: admin-nav-{dashboard|hero-slides|services|projects|products|testimonials|news-blogs|clients|statistics|contact-inbox|site-settings}. Drawer Save/Cancel may be visually covered by Emergent badge — use element.click() via JS if force=True doesn't work.
